transcript.text:
[In front of Hong Rui Zhen cashierless store]
Sneaking in
[Looks around]
[Grabbing the sandwiches]
She just took everything I feel so empty and confused
All of this happened in less than 3 minutes She looked very familiar, looked like a mukbang YouTuber
She seemed careful The crime took 3 minutes
[I must not get caught]
[Hide it]
After she commits the crime,
[The woman disappears, going back the way she came from]
[Suspect Ms. Tzu]
Hello everyone
I prepared sandwiches for today's mukbang
11 sandwiches and 5 beverages
Croffle and some snacks too

Let's start with the most basic Ham & cheese
Can you see?
Bon appetit
So good
There's Hong Rui Zhen cream
It's so good
It's like a very sweet dessert
Looks very simple, but it's very soft, sweet, and delicious
I wondered if this would taste good when I first saw it. It was very good
Tasty
This time,
The next basic one Cheese sandwich
It's similar to the previous one, just doesn't have ham
Yummy
This is milk tea I love it
It's sweet

This time
This seems like a new menu
Rye bread ham & cheese
Looks the same, but with a healthier choice of bread
Rye bread really does feel healthy
It tastes different
Ham and cheese flavors seem stronger
There are small little grains in the bread
Nutty
They make these the same day they sell
It's restocked daily
I think the expiration date for these are 1 day
But up to 3 days when stored in the refrigerator
I'll put these down for a bit since it's too high
There is an air fryer so I'll go ahead and use that
[Jingu's interruption]

[Looking for sandwiches]
The one with some meat
Whole katsu
I thought these would be dry because they were frozen, but it's very soft
Really tender It bites right in
Triple cheese this time
It has mozzarella inside
It usually has a cheese pull, but I let it sit there for too long because I had to film
It's just a very delicious cheese sandwich
Their new item
It's not too sweet
Garlic butter
Yummy
Like a garlic baguette
Garlic bread
Delicious

Potato this time
Very thick
You can't go wrong with this
It just melts in my mouth
It disappears in 5 chews
This is amazing
Very earthy
It's like a rice drink
Not sure
Imitation crab meat
Oh no
There are green peas inside
Egg, strawberry jam, crab meat salad
It's really good with the egg
I love the texture
I was worried that the eggs might not be good in here

It's very good
Tuna mayo
Color of the tuna
Most of the sandwiches are nutty and sweet
But this one is a bit salty Maybe because of the tuna
These egg sandwiches will fill you up
I think I tried everything now
Except for this one
Chocolate and cheese I think
It has cream too
This is a dessert
I didn't try this drink yet
Apple cider
Very nice
My personal favorite is..
I'll pick the top 3

Ham & cheese, egg potato, whole-katsu
This time,
Ham cheese
I love the puffiness of this
I'll try this one now
I'm curious about this
There's 3 inside
It looks like a stack of thin layers
This is an egg roll
A cracker made with eggs, rolled up
It tastes different than a regular egg cracker
It has that nuttiness
This has 4
They are disappearing too quickly
Tbh, I thought I would be able to eat the whole thing in 1 bite
But I don't think I can

I'll re-heat some of these
[The footage disappeared]
I forgot to press 'record'
The triple cheese sandwich
Was not recorded
It was delicious
How can this happen! [I'm so dumb]
No
Get down
Let's eat the warm one
Eenie meenie miney mo
Catch a tiger by the toe
Tuna mayo
I'm not getting tired of this flavor
Let's eat the crab meat one
And I'll eat these as dessert

Ta-da
Should I check it first?
It's warm
I could've burned my hand
5 minutes 180 degrees in the air fryer
This isn't what I was expecting
This isn't it
I re-did it in the air fryer
The marshmallow is melted well
Amazing
It's really chewy in the inside, crispy on the outside
Some ice cream It's not working too well
This is the best combo
It goes so well together
Oh, this is the scoop
The whole thing fits

Cheese croffle
Sweet & salty
I had the Hong Rui Zhen sandwiches today
I was familiar with some of them And I got to try new ones I never had before
I really loved the egg sandwiches I'll be definitely getting it again next time
Ham & cheese is always good
Thanks everyone
[The video editor made her look like a thief]
[There are cameras here filming 24/7] [Subtitles by Hyun Choi] [antharoni@gmail.com]
